documentation.process: Teams may request the domain agent team to process one-hour recordings provided via a shareable link (e.g., S3 bucket). The team should be equipped to access and process the recording via the given link.
documentation.integration_note: Ensure support for remote reading capabilities, particularly for S3 bucket links.

architectural_patterns: Integration with external storage (S3 bucket) for reading provided media data
Support for access control and permission management when accessing linked content

domain_context.application: Domain agent capable of processing audio recordings from other teams
domain_context.context: Designed for collaborative use, where input data may be provided by external teams via remote links.

business_rules: The domain agent must be able to read audio/recording data passed via external links (e.g., S3 bucket).
Requests for processing remote recordings should be supported as part of inter-team service.
